name: com.bidsparq/mcp
title: BidSparq
description: Search U.S. federal, state, and local RFPs, subaward primes, pricing, and vendor data.

environmentVariables.name: BIDSPARQ_API_KEY

environmentVariables.name: BIDSPARQ_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL (defaults to https://bidsparq.com)
